predicate.name: isScalarType03
predicate.body:
exists(Type ut | ut = t.getUnderlyingType() |
    ut instanceof ArithmeticType or
    ut instanceof Enum or
    ut instanceof FunctionPointerType or
    ut instanceof PointerToMemberType or
    ut instanceof PointerType or
    isScalarType03(ut.(SpecifiedType).getUnspecifiedType())
  )
predicate.comments: Holds if `t` is a scalar type, according to the rules specified in C++03 3.9(10):Arithmetic types (3.9.1),     enumeration types, pointer types, and pointer to member types (3.9.2), and cv-qualified versions of these types (3.9.3) are  collectively called scalar types.

class.comments: A header file with the `#pragma once` include guard.

predicate.name: PragmaOnceIncludeGuard
predicate.body: exists(PreprocessorPragma p | p.getFile() = this and p.getHead()= "once")
